issues.title: Local constant uses SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE instead of camelCase
issues.description: ORDER_ID_PREVIEW_LENGTH is a local (non-exported) constant. Per naming conventions, local constants should use camelCase, not SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE.

issues.title: Local constant uses SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE instead of camelCase
issues.description: ISO_DATE_LENGTH is a local constant defined inside a function. Per naming conventions, local constants should use camelCase.
